message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the cheap price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 4 people and 2 nights starting from wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from bishops stortford
The train should be on the same day as the hotel booking and should arrive by 20:30
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
